item.title: Friday Dump
item.description:
God bless you?
Whole aisle to himself, yessir
For the supremely lazy
Mmmmmmm
Roughing it
My burlesque name!? Spelled just right!? Thanks Honey!
Bored as fuck
At 3 am, mostly
The two extremes
I'll take either's lifestyle
Bitch ass brain, making me take unaffordable drugs to reach baseline
*Insert Nelson Ha Ha gif here*
Yup
No one likes a dry pussycat
New Rick Roll
Gimme gimme gimme
Oh, Miette
Confusing attention for affection again, huh?
Satisfying crunch
Cuddlemonsters unite!
He he
Feels Egyptian in style
Silly critters
One corner of the room, maybe
We literally fought a World War over this...I will end you on sight
Need room for activities
Good fuckin luck, boy-o
Womp womp
I just hear JFK saying hahd
I don't dress it, but I am in fact very much both
Libra with a Virgo cusp...guess I'm undercooked
Fucking yogurt talking shi...oh, I'm the asshole
The fingertip blood just gets me
Spot on
Because praying ain't shit
It's true!
Megan Mullally, for the win, every time
I can't stop you, Paige
WAP
Cock of the walk
Self care is important
Want some food, or lost your appetite
Grandma gives gains
That's a no from me, dog
Perpetually
Weird
She's so sweet about it
??
Growing into its head
Double wrapped

item.title: Vote For Pedro
item.description: I just wanted to share this as a bit of a timeline cleanser, a small pleasant break from the unceasing horrors that come across the board. Just gaze upon this gentleman and breathe. *breathe in* *breathe out* . Thanks for stopping by, now back to the horrors!

item.title: I'm numb.
item.description:
My pup, Kairi, had a vet appointment today. They said surgery won't help and that she has less than a month. We're crushed. I've never seen my husband cry like this. It's breaking my heart. Hug your pets.
We love you, sweet girl.
item.dc:creator: Zinfandella

item.title: Fresh Friday MEME DUMP for your coffee (hold on, the weekend is almost here)
item.description:
1
2. Work smarter, not harde... oh
3. Normal people: goes to college and learns useful skill so they can find a good job this guy:
4
5. The women in front of her was about to sprint6
6. Musical doggo
7. Squishi horse
8. Gym sisters
9
10. Your proudest unzip
11. Behold... magic
12. Truly inspirational
13. Come on, it's Friday! Gimme a break
14
15. I think a good life advice I just added. P.S. This a screenshot from the game I'm currently working on. If you like wacky adventures and passive aggressive humor, that you might like my Stanley Parable inspired game called Do Not Press The Button. Please wishlist on Steam, as it helps us small inide devs: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Dont_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse_The_Game/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Not my face!
item.dc:creator: MidlifecrisisDad

item.title: Day 12
item.description: https://youtu.be/CknbyQPhE-4 How quickly it becomes difficult to do it every day. I knew if I didn't walk as soon as I got home, I wouldn't. And it took me a bit to get back around here to post it. But it happened. And will happen tomorrow. And the next day. And at some point I'll break out the cane and see how I do with that, but I'll have my wife around just to try and help keep things safe. I've also got to tackle steps and non-flat surfaces. This is going to take some time. https://ieh.one/t/day-12/102
item.dc:creator: daychilde

item.title: LMAO, I Wonder Why!
item.description:
Just my hot take of course but this reeks to me of a new chief who's worried about potential budget cuts. 'Cause we all know crime pays - if you're law enforcement or private prisons. And of course with the changes coming next January we're certainly going to need some fresh bodies to replace those 'horrible illegal immigrants' who've been sent home. Full article - https://www.yahoo.com/news/lapd-chief-says-people-arent-202657586.html
I love it when the problem, or at least a bit part of it, is starting you in the face. Can I see a show of hands - who thinks something will actually be done???
This was the icing on the cake for me, there's a true gem in every one of these paragraphs. "...responsible adoption and use of technology with a steadfast commitment to privacy." Use of technology: until body cameras no longer come with an off switch, or there are actual consequences when it's used improperly, I call bullshit. "...concerns that the LAPD under his watch would be overly aggressive." I dunno, repeatedly killing people who called you for help and innocent bystanders and then hiding behind 'Qualified Immunity' will do that. "... a shared commitment to safety and mutual respect.” Please, if this were the case do you really think cops would be so sensitive to being recorded, IN PUBLIC, when performing searches, arrests, etc.? I'm not talking about those dumbasses that are right up on the cops and are an actual and potential threat, I'm talking about those recording from a responsible distance and not interfering in any way. And yet the cops will shut them down lest the public get a true, unfiltered view of how they perform their duties.
item.dc:creator: divjnky

item.title: Comics that did not make front page (OC)
item.description: This is a collection of my less known comics that did not make front page. So if you missed some of them there they are. For more : https://www.instagram.com/gryzlock_comics/profilecard/?igsh=MW1jMHF0eW0wdDVj Cheers. :) Fp edit: well... can't say there never did front page anymore ?
item.dc:creator: gryzlock

item.title: Yelling into the void
item.description: *haven't worked in a professional environment (I've been spending the last 14 years volunteering as tutor and substitute teacher, for various reasons.) Nervous, excited, nauseous. Not used to dealing with people in academia (job is at a university). Haven't told my family, because I didn't want to have to tell them afterwards that I didn't get it. This could change my life for the better. Really just needed to shout it out.
item.dc:creator: DutchBoeremeisie

item.title: Images of Note: poop
item.description:
I'm just waiting for Trump to declare a literal captain planet villain as head of the EPA.
B R I C K
we did some weird shit.
p o o p
everywhere
Gnostic Christianity is really wild, according to the Gnostics, Jesus named Simon "Peter" because he was dumb as a rock.
owo
GIRLCOCK HEADQUARTERS ARE WATCHING YOU POOP!
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky The internet is fucking weird.
